"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-290", "name": "Authentication Bypass by Spoofing"}], "description": "## Impact
The `MicrosoftAgent365Trigger` and `StripeTrigger` node did not validate that inbound requests. As a result, an unauthenticated attacker who knows the webhook URL could submit a forged payload and cause the workflow to execute with attacker-controlled data.

## Patches
The issue has been fixed in n8n versions 2.25.7, and 2.26.2. Users should upgrade to one of these versions or later to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Deactivate any workflows using the Microsoft Agent 365 Trigger node or Stripe Trigger node until the instance can be upgraded.
- Restrict network access to the n8n webhook endpoint to trusted sources only.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00276, "percentile": 0.19514}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jvc7-762p-3743", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-16T19:00:13Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jvc7-762p-3743", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jvc7-762p-3743"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54308"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-23T17:17:07Z", "published_at": "2026-06-16T19:00:13Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-jvc7-762p-3743", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-54308", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jvc7-762p-3743"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-jvc7-762p-3743", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n: Missing Token Validation on Microsoft Agent 365 Trigger and Stripe Nodes", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-20T13:43:49Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jvc7-762p-3743", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.26.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.26.0, < 2.26.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.25.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.25.7"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n: Missing Token Validation on Microsoft Agent 365 Trigger and Stripe Nodes
